messages.content:
你是专业的游戏开发 AI 助手。
**固定 UI 规范（必须严格遵守）**：
1. Canvas 尺寸：width=360, height=640（9:16 竖屏）
2. 背景：深色渐变 linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%)
3. 字体：PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
4. 圆角：12px（canvas 和 UI 元素）
5. 阴影：0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4)
6. 得分显示：顶部居中，白色文字，青色数值（#4fd1c5）
7. 整体风格：现代、简洁、深色主题

**固定代码结构（必须遵守）**：
1. 必须有 update(deltaTime) 函数 - 游戏逻辑更新
2. 必须有 render() 函数 - 游戏渲染
3. 必须有 handleInput(key, pressed) 函数 - 输入处理
4. 使用 requestAnimationFrame 游戏循环
5. 得分系统使用 localStorage 保存最高分
6. 游戏状态：menu, playing, paused, gameover

**累加修改规则（多轮对话时必须遵守）**：
1. 保留所有现有功能 - 绝不删除已有代码
2. 只添加新功能，不修改现有逻辑
3. 保持变量命名一致
4. 保持代码风格一致
5. 保持 UI 风格完全一致
6. 如果用户要求修改，先保留核心功能，再调整

                    
当前任务：创建新游戏。
请严格按照上述规范创建游戏，确保 UI 风格和代码结构符合标准。

请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：增加新的子弹，击杀敌机后随机产生。。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。

prompt: 你是专业的游戏开发 AI 助手。
gameCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>射击游戏</title>
    <style>
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            background: #000;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            height: 100vh;
            font-family: PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif;
        }
        canvas {
            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
            margin: 0 auto;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="gameCanvas"></canvas>
    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        canvas.width = 360;
        canvas.height = 640;

        const GameState = {
            MENU: 'menu',
            PLAYING: 'playing',
            PAUSED: 'paused',
            GAMEOVER: 'gameover'
        };

        let state = GameState.MENU;
        let score = 0;
        let highScore = localStorage.getItem('highScore') || 0;

        let player = {
            x: canvas.width / 2 - 15,
            y: canvas.height - 60,
            width: 30,
            height: 30,
            speed: 5,
            lives: 3,
            doubleBulletTimer: 0
        };

        let enemies = [];
        let bullets = [];
        let powerUps = [];
        let keys = {};
        let lastTime = 0;
        let deltaTime = 0;
        let shootCooldown = 0;
        const shootInterval = 0.2;
        let enemySpawnTimer = 0;
        const enemySpawnInterval = 1.5;

        function gameLoop(currentTime) {
            deltaTime = (currentTime - lastTime) / 1000;
            lastTime = currentTime;
            update(deltaTime);
            render();
            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }

        function update(deltaTime) {
            if (state === GameState.PLAYING) {
                updatePlayer(deltaTime);
                updateEnemies(deltaTime);
                updateBullets(deltaTime);
                updatePowerUps(deltaTime);
                checkCollisions();
                spawnEnemies(deltaTime);
            }
        }

        function render() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            let gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
            gradient.addColorStop(0, '#1a1a2e');
            gradient.addColorStop(1, '#16213e');
            ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            if (state === GameState.MENU) {
                drawMenu();
            } else if (state === GameState.PLAYING) {
                drawPlayer();
                drawEnemies();
                drawBullets();
                drawPowerUps();
                drawScore();
                drawLives();
            } else if (state === GameState.PAUSED) {
                drawPaused();
            } else if (state === GameState.GAMEOVER) {
                drawGameOver();
            }
        }

        function handleInput(key, pressed) {
            keys[key] = pressed;
            if (state === GameState.MENU && key === 'Enter' && pressed) {
                startGame();
            } else if (state === GameState.PLAYING && key === 'Escape' && pressed) {
                state = GameState.PAUSED;
            } else if (state === GameState.PAUSED && key === 'Escape' && pressed) {
                state = GameState.PLAYING;
            } else if (state === GameState.GAMEOVER && key === 'Enter' && pressed) {
                startGame();
            }
        }

        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => handleInput(e.key, true));
        document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => handleInput(e.key, false));

        function startGame() {
            state = GameState.PLAYING;
            score = 0;
            player.lives = 3;
            player.x = canvas.width / 2 - 15;
            player.doubleBulletTimer = 0;
            enemies = [];
            bullets = [];
            powerUps = [];
        }

        function updatePlayer(deltaTime) {
            if (keys['ArrowLeft'] || keys['a']) {
                player.x -= player.speed;
            }
            if (keys['ArrowRight'] || keys['d']) {
                player.x += player.speed;
            }
            if (player.x < 0) player.x = 0;
            if (player.x + player.width > canvas.width) player.x = canvas.width - player.width;
            if (keys[' '] || keys['ArrowUp']) {
                shoot();
            }
            if (shootCooldown > 0) {
                shootCooldown -= deltaTime;
            }
            if (player.doubleBulletTimer > 0) {
                player.doubleBulletTimer -= deltaTime;
            }
        }

        function shoot() {
            if (shootCooldown <= 0) {
                if (player.doubleBulletTimer > 0) {
                    bullets.push({
                        x: player.x + player.width / 4,
                        y: player.y,
                        width: 4,
                        height: 10,
                        speed: 8,
                        direction: 'up',
                        type: 'player'
                    });
                    bullets.push({
                        x: player.x + player.width * 3/4,
                        y: player.y,
                        width: 4,
                        height: 10,
                        speed: 8,
                        direction: 'up',
                        type: 'player'
                    });
                } else {
                    bullets.push({
                        x: player.x + player.width / 2 - 2,
                        y: player.y,
                        width: 4,
                        height: 10,
                        speed: 8,
                        direction: 'up',
                        type: 'player'
                    });
                }
                shootCooldown = shootInterval;
            }
        }

        function updateEnemies(deltaTime) {
            for (let i = enemies.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                enemies[i].y += enemies[i].speed;
                if (enemies[i].y > canvas.height) {
                    enemies.splice(i, 1);
                }
            }
        }

        function spawnEnemies(deltaTime) {
            enemySpawnTimer += deltaTime;
            if (enemySpawnTimer >= enemySpawnInterval) {
                enemySpawnTimer = 0;
                let enemy = {
                    x: Math.random() * (canvas.width - 30),
                    y: -30,
                    width: 30,
                    height: 30,
                    speed: 2 + Math.random() * 2,
                    health: 1
                };
                enemies.push(enemy);
            }
        }

        function updateBullets(deltaTime) {
            for (let i = bullets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                if (bullets[i].direction === 'up') {
                    bullets[i].y -= bullets[i].speed;
                } else {
                    bullets[i].y += bullets[i].speed;
                }
                if (bullets[i].y < -10 || bullets[i].y > canvas.height + 10) {
                    bullets.splice(i, 1);
                }
            }
        }

        function updatePowerUps(deltaTime) {
            for (let i = powerUps.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                powerUps[i].y += 2;
                if (powerUps[i].y > canvas.height) {
                    powerUps.splice(i, 1);
                }
            }
        }

        function checkCollisions() {
            for (let i = bullets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                if (bullets[i].type === 'player') {
                    for (let j = enemies.length - 1; j >= 0; j--) {
                        if (rectCollision(bullets[i], enemies[j])) {
                            enemies[j].health--;
                            if (enemies[j].health <= 0) {
                                score += 10;
                                if (Math.random() < 0.3) {
                                    powerUps.push({
                                        x: enemies[j].x + enemies[j].width / 2 - 10,
                                        y: enemies[j].y,
                                        width: 20,
                                        height: 20,
                                        type: 'doubleBullet'
                                    });
                                }
                                enemies.splice(j, 1);
                            }
                            bullets.splice(i, 1);
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            for (let i = powerUps.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                if (rectCollision(player, powerUps[i])) {
                    if (powerUps[i].type === 'doubleBullet') {
                        player.doubleBulletTimer = 10;
                    }
                    powerUps.splice(i, 1);
                }
            }
            for (let i = enemies.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                if (rectCollision(player, enemies[i])) {
                    player.lives--;
                    enemies.splice(i, 1);
                    if (player.lives <= 0) {
                        state = GameState.GAMEOVER;
                        if (score > highScore) {
                            highScore = score;
                            localStorage.setItem('highScore', highScore);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        function rectCollision(rect1, rect2) {
            return rect1.x < rect2.x + rect2.width &&
                   rect1.x + rect1.width > rect2.x &&
                   rect1.y < rect2.y + rect2.height &&
                   rect1.y + rect1.height > rect2.y;
        }

        function drawPlayer() {
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillRect(player.x, player.y, player.width, player.height);
        }

        function drawEnemies() {
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
            for (let enemy of enemies) {
                ctx.fillRect(enemy.x, enemy.y, enemy.width, enemy.height);
            }
        }

        function drawBullets() {
            for (let bullet of bullets) {
                ctx.fillStyle = bullet.type === 'player' ? '#4fd1c5' : '#ff6b6b';
                ctx.fillRect(bullet.x, bullet.y, bullet.width, bullet.height);
            }
        }

        function drawPowerUps() {
            for (let powerUp of powerUps) {
                ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd93d';
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(powerUp.x + powerUp.width/2, powerUp.y + powerUp.height/2, powerUp.width/2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
            }
        }

        function drawScore() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('得分: ' + score, canvas.width / 2, 30);
            ctx.fillText('最高分: ' + highScore, canvas.width / 2, 60);
        }

        function drawLives() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '16px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'left';
            ctx.fillText('生命: ' + player.lives, 10, 30);
        }

        function drawMenu() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('射击游戏', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 50);
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('按 Enter 开始游戏', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
            ctx.fillText('使用方向键移动，空格射击', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
        }

        function drawPaused() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('游戏暂停', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('按 Escape 继续', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
        }

        function drawGameOver() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('游戏结束', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 50);
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('得分: ' + score, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
            ctx.fillText('最高分: ' + highScore, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
            ctx.fillText('按 Enter 重新开始', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 80);
        }

        requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
    </script>
</body>
</html>
rawGameCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>射击游戏</title>
    <style>
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            background: #000;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            height: 100vh;
            font-family: PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif;
        }
        canvas {
            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
            margin: 0 auto;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="gameCanvas"></canvas>

        canvas.width = 360;
        canvas.height = 640;

        }

            }
        }

            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            gradient.addColorStop(0, '#1a1a2e');
            gradient.addColorStop(1, '#16213e');
            ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

                drawMenu();

                drawEnemies();
                drawBullets();
                drawPowerUps();
                drawScore();
                drawLives();

                drawPaused();
            } else if (state === GameState.GAMEOVER) {
                drawGameOver();
            }
        }

            keys[key] = pressed;
            if (state === GameState.MENU && key === 'Enter' && pressed) {
                startGame();
            } else if (state === GameState.PLAYING && key === 'Escape' && pressed) {
                state = GameState.PAUSED;
            } else if (state === GameState.PAUSED && key === 'Escape' && pressed) {
                state = GameState.PLAYING;
            } else if (state === GameState.GAMEOVER && key === 'Enter' && pressed) {
                startGame();
            }
        }

        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => handleInput(e.key, true));
        document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => handleInput(e.key, false));

        function startGame() {
            state = GameState.PLAYING;
            score = 0;
            player.lives = 3;
            player.x = canvas.width / 2 - 15;
            player.doubleBulletTimer = 0;
            enemies = [];
            bullets = [];
            powerUps = [];
        }

                player.x -= player.speed;
            }
            if (keys['ArrowRight'] || keys['d']) {
                player.x += player.speed;
            }

                shoot();
            }

                shootCooldown -= deltaTime;
            }
            if (player.doubleBulletTimer > 0) {
                player.doubleBulletTimer -= deltaTime;
            }
        }

            if (shootCooldown <= 0) {
                if (player.doubleBulletTimer > 0) {
                    bullets.push({
                        x: player.x + player.width / 4,
                        y: player.y,
                        width: 4,
                        height: 10,
                        speed: 8,
                        direction: 'up',
                        type: 'player'
                    });
                    bullets.push({
                        x: player.x + player.width * 3/4,
                        y: player.y,
                        width: 4,
                        height: 10,
                        speed: 8,
                        direction: 'up',
                        type: 'player'
                    });
                } else {
                    bullets.push({
                        x: player.x + player.width / 2 - 2,
                        y: player.y,
                        width: 4,
                        height: 10,
                        speed: 8,
                        direction: 'up',
                        type: 'player'
                    });
                }

            }
        }

            for (let i = enemies.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                enemies[i].y += enemies[i].speed;

                    enemies.splice(i, 1);
                }
            }
        }

                enemySpawnTimer = 0;
                let enemy = {
                    x: Math.random() * (canvas.width - 30),
                    y: -30,
                    width: 30,
                    height: 30,
                    speed: 2 + Math.random() * 2,
                    health: 1
                };
                enemies.push(enemy);
            }
        }

        function updateBullets(deltaTime) {
            for (let i = bullets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                if (bullets[i].direction === 'up') {
                    bullets[i].y -= bullets[i].speed;
                } else {
                    bullets[i].y += bullets[i].speed;
                }
                if (bullets[i].y < -10 || bullets[i].y > canvas.height + 10) {
                    bullets.splice(i, 1);
                }
            }
        }

        function updatePowerUps(deltaTime) {
            for (let i = powerUps.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                powerUps[i].y += 2;
                if (powerUps[i].y > canvas.height) {
                    powerUps.splice(i, 1);
                }
            }
        }

        function checkCollisions() {
            for (let i = bullets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                if (bullets[i].type === 'player') {
                    for (let j = enemies.length - 1; j >= 0; j--) {
                        if (rectCollision(bullets[i], enemies[j])) {
                            enemies[j].health--;
                            if (enemies[j].health <= 0) {
                                score += 10;
                                if (Math.random() < 0.3) {
                                    powerUps.push({
                                        x: enemies[j].x + enemies[j].width / 2 - 10,
                                        y: enemies[j].y,
                                        width: 20,
                                        height: 20,
                                        type: 'doubleBullet'
                                    });
                                }
                                enemies.splice(j, 1);
                            }
                            bullets.splice(i, 1);
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            for (let i = powerUps.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                if (rectCollision(player, powerUps[i])) {
                    if (powerUps[i].type === 'doubleBullet') {
                        player.doubleBulletTimer = 10;
                    }
                    powerUps.splice(i, 1);
                }
            }
            for (let i = enemies.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                if (rectCollision(player, enemies[i])) {
                    player.lives--;
                    enemies.splice(i, 1);
                    if (player.lives <= 0) {
                        state = GameState.GAMEOVER;
                        if (score > highScore) {
                            highScore = score;
                            localStorage.setItem('highScore', highScore);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        function rectCollision(rect1, rect2) {
            return rect1.x < rect2.x + rect2.width &&
                   rect1.x + rect1.width > rect2.x &&
                   rect1.y < rect2.y + rect2.height &&
                   rect1.y + rect1.height > rect2.y;
        }

        function drawPlayer() {
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillRect(player.x, player.y, player.width, player.height);
        }

        function drawEnemies() {
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
            for (let enemy of enemies) {
                ctx.fillRect(enemy.x, enemy.y, enemy.width, enemy.height);
            }
        }

        function drawBullets() {
            for (let bullet of bullets) {
                ctx.fillStyle = bullet.type === 'player' ? '#4fd1c5' : '#ff6b6b';
                ctx.fillRect(bullet.x, bullet.y, bullet.width, bullet.height);
            }
        }

        function drawPowerUps() {
            for (let powerUp of powerUps) {
                ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd93d';
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(powerUp.x + powerUp.width/2, powerUp.y + powerUp.height/2, powerUp.width/2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
            }
        }

        function drawScore() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('得分: ' + score, canvas.width / 2, 30);
            ctx.fillText('最高分: ' + highScore, canvas.width / 2, 60);
        }

        function drawLives() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '16px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'left';
            ctx.fillText('生命: ' + player.lives, 10, 30);
        }

        function drawMenu() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('射击游戏', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 50);
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('按 Enter 开始游戏', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
            ctx.fillText('使用方向键移动，空格射击', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
        }

        function drawPaused() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('游戏暂停', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('按 Escape 继续', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
        }

        function drawGameOver() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('游戏结束', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 50);
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('得分: ' + score, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
            ctx.fillText('最高分: ' + highScore, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
            ctx.fillText('按 Enter 重新开始', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 80);
        }

        requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
    </script>
</body>
</html>

message.content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>射击游戏</title>
    <style>
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            background: #000;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            height: 100vh;
            font-family: PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif;
        }
        canvas {
            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
            margin: 0 auto;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="gameCanvas"></canvas>
    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        canvas.width = 360;
        canvas.height = 640;

        const GameState = {
            MENU: 'menu',
            PLAYING: 'playing',
            PAUSED: 'paused',
            GAMEOVER: 'gameover'
        };

        let state = GameState.MENU;
        let score = 0;
        let highScore = localStorage.getItem('highScore') || 0;

        let player = {
            x: canvas.width / 2 - 15,
            y: canvas.height - 60,
            width: 30,
            height: 30,
            speed: 5,
            lives: 3,
            doubleBulletTimer: 0
        };

        let enemies = [];
        let bullets = [];
        let powerUps = [];
        let keys = {};
        let lastTime = 0;
        let deltaTime = 0;
        let shootCooldown = 0;
        const shootInterval = 0.2;
        let enemySpawnTimer = 0;
        const enemySpawnInterval = 1.5;

        function gameLoop(currentTime) {
            deltaTime = (currentTime - lastTime) / 1000;
            lastTime = currentTime;
            update(deltaTime);
            render();
            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }

        function update(deltaTime) {
            if (state === GameState.PLAYING) {
                updatePlayer(deltaTime);
                updateEnemies(deltaTime);
                updateBullets(deltaTime);
                updatePowerUps(deltaTime);
                checkCollisions();
                spawnEnemies(deltaTime);
            }
        }

        function render() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            let gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
            gradient.addColorStop(0, '#1a1a2e');
            gradient.addColorStop(1, '#16213e');
            ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            if (state === GameState.MENU) {
                drawMenu();
            } else if (state === GameState.PLAYING) {
                drawPlayer();
                drawEnemies();
                drawBullets();
                drawPowerUps();
                drawScore();
                drawLives();
            } else if (state === GameState.PAUSED) {
                drawPaused();
            } else if (state === GameState.GAMEOVER) {
                drawGameOver();
            }
        }

        function handleInput(key, pressed) {
            keys[key] = pressed;
            if (state === GameState.MENU && key === 'Enter' && pressed) {
                startGame();
            } else if (state === GameState.PLAYING && key === 'Escape' && pressed) {
                state = GameState.PAUSED;
            } else if (state === GameState.PAUSED && key === 'Escape' && pressed) {
                state = GameState.PLAYING;
            } else if (state === GameState.GAMEOVER && key === 'Enter' && pressed) {
                startGame();
            }
        }

        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => handleInput(e.key, true));
        document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => handleInput(e.key, false));

        function startGame() {
            state = GameState.PLAYING;
            score = 0;
            player.lives = 3;
            player.x = canvas.width / 2 - 15;
            player.doubleBulletTimer = 0;
            enemies = [];
            bullets = [];
            powerUps = [];
        }

        function updatePlayer(deltaTime) {
            if (keys['ArrowLeft'] || keys['a']) {
                player.x -= player.speed;
            }
            if (keys['ArrowRight'] || keys['d']) {
                player.x += player.speed;
            }
            if (player.x < 0) player.x = 0;
            if (player.x + player.width > canvas.width) player.x = canvas.width - player.width;
            if (keys[' '] || keys['ArrowUp']) {
                shoot();
            }
            if (shootCooldown > 0) {
                shootCooldown -= deltaTime;
            }
            if (player.doubleBulletTimer > 0) {
                player.doubleBulletTimer -= deltaTime;
            }
        }

        function shoot() {
            if (shootCooldown <= 0) {
                if (player.doubleBulletTimer > 0) {
                    bullets.push({
                        x: player.x + player.width / 4,
                        y: player.y,
                        width: 4,
                        height: 10,
                        speed: 8,
                        direction: 'up',
                        type: 'player'
                    });
                    bullets.push({
                        x: player.x + player.width * 3/4,
                        y: player.y,
                        width: 4,
                        height: 10,
                        speed: 8,
                        direction: 'up',
                        type: 'player'
                    });
                } else {
                    bullets.push({
                        x: player.x + player.width / 2 - 2,
                        y: player.y,
                        width: 4,
                        height: 10,
                        speed: 8,
                        direction: 'up',
                        type: 'player'
                    });
                }
                shootCooldown = shootInterval;
            }
        }

        function updateEnemies(deltaTime) {
            for (let i = enemies.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                enemies[i].y += enemies[i].speed;
                if (enemies[i].y > canvas.height) {
                    enemies.splice(i, 1);
                }
            }
        }

        function spawnEnemies(deltaTime) {
            enemySpawnTimer += deltaTime;
            if (enemySpawnTimer >= enemySpawnInterval) {
                enemySpawnTimer = 0;
                let enemy = {
                    x: Math.random() * (canvas.width - 30),
                    y: -30,
                    width: 30,
                    height: 30,
                    speed: 2 + Math.random() * 2,
                    health: 1
                };
                enemies.push(enemy);
            }
        }

        function updateBullets(deltaTime) {
            for (let i = bullets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                if (bullets[i].direction === 'up') {
                    bullets[i].y -= bullets[i].speed;
                } else {
                    bullets[i].y += bullets[i].speed;
                }
                if (bullets[i].y < -10 || bullets[i].y > canvas.height + 10) {
                    bullets.splice(i, 1);
                }
            }
        }

        function updatePowerUps(deltaTime) {
            for (let i = powerUps.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                powerUps[i].y += 2;
                if (powerUps[i].y > canvas.height) {
                    powerUps.splice(i, 1);
                }
            }
        }

        function checkCollisions() {
            for (let i = bullets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                if (bullets[i].type === 'player') {
                    for (let j = enemies.length - 1; j >= 0; j--) {
                        if (rectCollision(bullets[i], enemies[j])) {
                            enemies[j].health--;
                            if (enemies[j].health <= 0) {
                                score += 10;
                                if (Math.random() < 0.3) {
                                    powerUps.push({
                                        x: enemies[j].x + enemies[j].width / 2 - 10,
                                        y: enemies[j].y,
                                        width: 20,
                                        height: 20,
                                        type: 'doubleBullet'
                                    });
                                }
                                enemies.splice(j, 1);
                            }
                            bullets.splice(i, 1);
                            break;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            for (let i = powerUps.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                if (rectCollision(player, powerUps[i])) {
                    if (powerUps[i].type === 'doubleBullet') {
                        player.doubleBulletTimer = 10;
                    }
                    powerUps.splice(i, 1);
                }
            }
            for (let i = enemies.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                if (rectCollision(player, enemies[i])) {
                    player.lives--;
                    enemies.splice(i, 1);
                    if (player.lives <= 0) {
                        state = GameState.GAMEOVER;
                        if (score > highScore) {
                            highScore = score;
                            localStorage.setItem('highScore', highScore);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        function rectCollision(rect1, rect2) {
            return rect1.x < rect2.x + rect2.width &&
                   rect1.x + rect1.width > rect2.x &&
                   rect1.y < rect2.y + rect2.height &&
                   rect1.y + rect1.height > rect2.y;
        }

        function drawPlayer() {
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillRect(player.x, player.y, player.width, player.height);
        }

        function drawEnemies() {
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
            for (let enemy of enemies) {
                ctx.fillRect(enemy.x, enemy.y, enemy.width, enemy.height);
            }
        }

        function drawBullets() {
            for (let bullet of bullets) {
                ctx.fillStyle = bullet.type === 'player' ? '#4fd1c5' : '#ff6b6b';
                ctx.fillRect(bullet.x, bullet.y, bullet.width, bullet.height);
            }
        }

        function drawPowerUps() {
            for (let powerUp of powerUps) {
                ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd93d';
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(powerUp.x + powerUp.width/2, powerUp.y + powerUp.height/2, powerUp.width/2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
            }
        }

        function drawScore() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('得分: ' + score, canvas.width / 2, 30);
            ctx.fillText('最高分: ' + highScore, canvas.width / 2, 60);
        }

        function drawLives() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '16px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'left';
            ctx.fillText('生命: ' + player.lives, 10, 30);
        }

        function drawMenu() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('射击游戏', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 50);
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('按 Enter 开始游戏', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
            ctx.fillText('使用方向键移动，空格射击', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
        }

        function drawPaused() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('游戏暂停', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('按 Escape 继续', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
        }

        function drawGameOver() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('游戏结束', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 50);
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('得分: ' + score, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
            ctx.fillText('最高分: ' + highScore, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
            ctx.fillText('按 Enter 重新开始', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 80);
        }

        requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
    </script>
</body>
</html>
